name_cn:
Genuine quality
New Version Cognac: 5BB142, Miu's new bowling bag, a flagship item on the official website, an absolute hit🔥 this year. Top-grade imported calfskin, Miu's unique Matelasse pattern, exquisite and structured body, front embossed logo matching the leather color, detachable and adjustable leather shoulder strap, cotton satin lining, zippered pocket, a favorite among celebrities and influencers. Size 22X10.5X7.5Cm, comes with original packaging
